title: Campus Conversation: Registration

segments.text: I'm trying to register for Professor Lin's economics class but it says it's full.
Yes, the lecture is full, but there's a waitlist.
You can add your name and you'll be notified if a spot opens up.
Honestly, this class usually has some turnover in the first week.
I'd say your chances are reasonable.
Could I also see the syllabus while I wait?

transcript: Hi, can you help me? I'm trying to register for Professor Lin's economics class but it says it's full. Let me check. Yes, the lecture is full, but there's a waitlist. You can add your name and you'll be notified if a spot opens up. How likely is that? Honestly, this class usually has some turnover in the first week. I'd say your chances are reasonable. Okay, please add me. Could I also see the syllabus while I wait?
